title: Swiggy Restaurant Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Swiggy Restaurant Partners is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Swiggy Restaurant Partners are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Kolkata. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Swiggy Restaurant Partners:
Swiggy Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Swiggy Restaurant Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
